text: The implementation of topological_ordering is incorrect because it only initializes ordered_nodes with nodes having no incoming edges and then tries to append nodes whose outgoing nodes are subsets of ordered_nodes. This process does not correctly capture the dependencies for a full topological sort, leading to missing nodes and an incorrect order, as shown by the failed tests.

data.label: topological_ordering function produces incorrect topological order
Tests fail with missing nodes and wrong order in results
ordered_nodes initialization only includes nodes without incoming edges
Appending nodes based on subset condition does not guarantee correct dependency resolution
